notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

home.heroDescription: Join 175,000+ members who enjoy better rates, lower fees, and personal service. As a not-for-profit credit union, your financial well-being is our only mission.
home.productsDescription: From everyday banking to major life milestones, we have the right solution for you.
home.whyChooseUsDescription: As a member-owned credit union, we invest in the tools and services that matter most to you.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Join the Demo CU Family?
home.ctaDescription: Open your account in minutes — online or at any of our branches. Membership is open to anyone in our community.

features.securityDesc: End-to-end encryption, multi-factor authentication, and 24/7 fraud monitoring protect every transaction.
features.mobileBankingDesc: Deposit checks, pay bills, transfer money, and manage cards — all from your phone or computer.
features.instantTransfersDesc: Move money between accounts instantly. Send to anyone within minutes.
features.competitiveRatesDesc: As a not-for-profit, we return earnings to you through better rates on savings and lower rates on loans.
features.rewardsCardsDesc: Earn up to 2% cash back on every purchase with no annual fee. Your rewards, your way.
features.freeAtmsDesc: Access your money nationwide through the CO-OP and Allpoint ATM networks at no extra cost.

checking.seoDescription: Open a free checking account with no monthly fees, no minimum balance, a free debit card, and access to {{atmCount}} surcharge-free ATMs nationwide.
checking.title: Free Checking
checking.description: Banking that works for you — not the other way around. Enjoy truly free checking with no hidden fees, no minimum balance, and access to {{atmCount}} surcharge-free ATMs.
checking.noMonthlyFeesDesc: Keep more of your money. Our Basic Checking has zero monthly maintenance fees — ever.
checking.noMinBalanceDesc: No required minimum balance to open or maintain your account.
checking.freeDebitCardDesc: Get a free Visa debit card with contactless pay and real-time transaction alerts.
checking.freeAtmsDesc: Access your cash surcharge-free at {{atmCount}} ATMs in the {{atmNetworks}} networks.
checking.compareDescription: Whether you need everyday banking or want to earn interest on your balance, we have an account that fits.
checking.ctaTitle: Ready to Switch to Better Banking?
checking.ctaDescription: Opening an account takes just minutes. Join thousands of members who enjoy fee-free checking.

savings.seoDescription: Grow your savings with competitive rates up to {{topRate}} {{rateLabel}}. Regular savings, high-yield savings, money market accounts, and certificates.
savings.title: Grow Your Savings
savings.description: Put your money to work with savings rates that outpace the big banks. Every dollar you deposit is federally insured and earns competitive dividends.
savings.depositInsurance: Federally insured up to {{insuranceLimit}} by {{insuranceBody}} — Your savings are safe with us.
savings.savingsDescription: From your first deposit to building serious wealth, we have the right savings account for every stage.
savings.certificatesDescription: Lock in a guaranteed rate and watch your money grow. The longer the term, the higher your return.
savings.ctaDescription: Open an account in minutes and start earning competitive dividends on every dollar. Your future self will thank you.
